reviews.review_description:
Rail Rampage brought to me a new unique shooting experience which is hard to find in VR. It was not only unique but also a lot of fun to play.
At the beginning, it seems like it will be a very chill and easy game but it can become pretty challenging at the end of the levels. Also, I loved how it felt to shoot and to reload.
I hope to see more progress from the developers on this game since it seems it has a lot of potential!
